title: Can both Kaworu and Rei be the 17th angel
display_title: Can both Kaworu and Rei be the 17th angel
wikitext:
[]: Can both Kaworu and Rei be the 17th angel?             Quote Post by Lujerker » Sat Sep 01, 2007 4:22 pm The description of the 17 angel says: " angel of the free wish " This shows Kaworu with his action against SEELE .... his revelation and his own desicion .... but Rei also do it.... when in EOE she reveals herself against Gendou.... Then Tabris are Kaworu and Rei .... i agree 2 things more: this question why Kaworu appears like the 17th angel and Rei not ??? if both are the same... and he tells sometthing to Rei in the 24 episode " We have the same nature " And the other thing is when MAGI detects Rei like an angel in the dogma terminal just like Kaworu..... BTW .... this topic is repeated ??? i hope not...

[]: Re: Can be Kaworu 'n Rei the 17 angel ???             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Sep 01, 2007 5:17 pm Lujerker wrote: Then Tabris are Kaworu and Rei .... i agree 2 things more: this question why Kaworu appears like the 17th angel and Rei not ??? if both are the same...

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 01, 2007 5:38 pm Soul, not DNA.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Sep 01, 2007 5:48 pm Adam is the 1st Angel Lilith is the 2nd Angel Kaworu is the vessel for Adam's soul Rei is the vessel for Lilith's soul The 17th Angel doesn't really exist. The numbering system is subjective. The humans number them according to discovery. They didn't know Kaworu was in fact Adam.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Sep 01, 2007 6:01 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: The 17th Angel doesn't really exist. The numbering system is subjective. The humans number them according to discovery.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sat Sep 01, 2007 6:36 pm The Dead Sea Scrolls also mention 18 Angels, though the FAR could have been tired and kind of out of it at the time after staying up all night to finish writing this paper for a race that doesn't even exist yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Tue Sep 04, 2007 2:12 pm Eva always give them "tips"..... the episode 24 just when "the 17 angel attack" MAGI detects Rei like an angel but what of 18 angels ???....

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Sep 04, 2007 3:08 pm Rei has Lilith's (the 2nd Angel's) soul and was producing an XBOX HUGE A.T. Field which is why Nerv detected something. Mankind is literally the 18th, but it's also symbolic in the sense because their A.T. Fields are psychological barriers and all.
summary: []: Can both Kaworu and Rei be the 17th angel?             Quote Post by Lujerker » Sat Sep 01, 2007 4:22 pm The description of the 17 angel says: " angel of the free wish " This shows Kaworu with his action against SEELE .... his revelation and his own desicion .... but Rei also do it.... when in EOE she reveals herself against Gendou.... Then Tabris are Kaworu and Rei .... i agree 2 things more: this question why Kaworu appears
